problem id: e34cc6dd
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) AND ROT(3)

examples:
  01110011 -> 10001001
  10101100 -> 00100000
  11100100 -> 00000011
  11111100 -> 11100011
  01000000 -> 00000000
  01100110 -> 00010001
  00001101 -> 00100000
  11010011 -> 00001110

query: 01101001
predicted answer: 00000001
